    let minTime = Infinity;
    const n = landStartTime.length;
    const m = waterStartTime.length;
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

            const waterStart = Math.max(landEnd, waterStartTime[j]);

            const case1 = waterEnd;

            const landStart = Math.max(waterEnd2, landStartTime[i]);
            const landEnd2 = landStart + landDuration[i];
            const case2 = landEnd2;
            
            const currentMin = Math.min(case1, case2);
            if (currentMin < minTime) {
                minTime = currentMin;
            }
        }
    }
    return minTime;
}
